# Concepts

## Append-only record revisions

Record updates append a new JSONL revision with the same logical id, while deletes append a tombstone that active reads, rendering, and search exclude.

Validation accepts repeated ids only as ordered revisions. Status, render, search, and record list/get use the latest non-deleted revision.

Files: `src/core/schemas.ts`, `src/core/store.ts`, `src/core/validator.ts`, `src/cli/commands/record.ts`

Tags: `records`, `v1`, `architecture`

Record: `concept_17ca8065-a8d3-4373-9afe-b47b51a424d3` | Authority: agent | Confidence: high

## CLI-first knowledge store

Wikiwiki stores repo knowledge as validated JSONL records and renders deterministic Markdown pages.

The MVP keeps the source of truth in .wikiwiki/records and treats wiki/ as generated output.

Files: `src/core/store.ts`, `src/core/renderer.ts`

Tags: `mvp`, `architecture`

Record: `concept_650e0409-9414-4667-8b40-f36c406a1cb0` | Authority: agent | Confidence: high

## Daily agent loop

Wikiwiki V1 supports a CLI-first loop for status, spin, structured capture, revision, validation, rendering, and local search.

The loop remains model-agnostic. Spin emits heuristic draft templates and command hints rather than AI-generated prose.

Files: `src/cli/commands/spin.ts`, `src/cli/commands/search.ts`, `src/cli/commands/symbol.ts`, `src/core/renderer.ts`

Tags: `cli`, `v1`, `agent-workflow`

Record: `concept_4fde0906-d53a-4b9f-b977-3fe964a9d447` | Authority: agent | Confidence: high

## Role-oriented human wiki compiler

Wikiwiki can compile structured records into UX and DX human wiki drafts for IDE agents to turn into polished prose.

The compiler keeps records as the source of truth, stores draft packets under .wikiwiki/drafts/compile, and publishes validated human pages under wiki/human.

Files: `src/core/compiler.ts`, `src/cli/commands/compile.ts`

Tags: `compile`, `ux`, `dx`, `agent-workflow`

Record: `concept_4e17c000-edc9-4895-9da1-85cde9756eab` | Authority: agent | Confidence: high

## Spin heuristics

The spin command turns git working tree changes into structured update suggestions without AI summarization.

The MVP reads git status and diff stats, groups changed files by simple path patterns, and returns JSON that an external agent can interpret.

Files: `src/cli/commands/spin.ts`, `src/core/git.ts`

Tags: `git`, `cli`

Record: `concept_26478291-0b15-4363-b661-436bab183226` | Authority: agent | Confidence: high
